name: avg_enrollment_by_county_for_charter_flag
description: Average K‑12 enrollment per county for schools where the `Charter` column matches the supplied flag. Returns only counties that have at least `min_charter_schools` matching schools.

charter_flag.description: Value of the `Charter` column (1 = charter school, 0 = non‑charter).

min_charter_schools.description: Minimum number of matching schools required for a county to be included.

return_description: {'averages': [{'county_name': str, 'avg_enrollment': float|None}, ...]}

name: avg_enrollment_difference_by_funding_type
description: Average of (Enrollment (K-12) − Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) for schools with a specified FundingType.

funding_type.description: Exact value of the `FundingType` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Locally funded').

return_description: {avg_difference: number|null} – the average difference, or null if no matching rows.

name: avg_free_meal_ratio_by_county_with_high_ratio
description: For each county that contains at least one school whose free‑meal ratio (Free Meal Count (K‑12) ÷ Enrollment (K‑12)) exceeds a given threshold, return the county name and the average free‑meal ratio across all its schools, ordered descending by the average.

ratio_threshold.description: Minimum free‑meal ratio to qualify a county (e.g., 0.5).

return_description: List of objects each with `county_name` (string) and `avg_ratio` (number). Empty list if no county meets the condition.

name: avg_monthly_school_openings_by_doc_county_year
description: Average number of schools opened per month in a given year for a specific DOC and county.

doc.description: DOC code identifying the school district (e.g., 52 for Elementary School District).

county_name.description: Exact county name as stored in the `County` column (e.g., 'Alameda').

return_description: {monthly_average: float|null} – average openings per month, or null if none.

name: count_active_schools_by_city_state
description: Count schools whose mailing address is in a given city and state, and whose StatusType matches the specified value.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `City` column in the schools table (e.g., 'San Joaquin').

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – the matching school count.

name: count_charter_schools_in_city_by_doc
description: Count charter schools (Charter = 1) located in a specific city and owned by a given DOC district.

doc_code.description: Value of the `DOC` column identifying the owning district (e.g., '52').

return_description: {count: integer|null} — number of matching schools, or null if none.

name: count_closures_by_year_city_doc_type
description: Count schools that closed in a specific year, within a given city, and of a particular DOC type.

year.description: Four‑digit year (e.g., '1989') matching the year part of ClosedDate.

city.description: Exact value of the `City` column (e.g., 'San Francisco').

doc_type.description: Exact value of the `DOCType` column (e.g., 'Community College District').

return_description: {closure_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools.

name: count_merged_schools_by_county_with_test_takers_below
description: Count schools whose StatusType is 'Merged', located in a specified county, and whose number of SAT test takers is less than a given threshold.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table.

max_test_takers.description: Upper exclusive bound for `NumTstTakr` in the satscores table.

return_description: {'school_count': integer|null} – the matching school count.

name: count_schools_by_city_and_sat_total_ge
description: Count schools whose mailing city matches the supplied name and whose total SAT score (AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) is greater than or equal to a given threshold.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `MailCity` column in the schools table (e.g., "Lakeport").

min_total_sat.description: Minimum total SAT score (AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) required, inclusive.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools.

name: count_schools_by_city_state_and_status
description: Count schools whose mailing city, mailing state, and StatusType match the provided values.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `City` column in the schools table (e.g., 'San Joaquin').

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools, or null if none.

name: count_schools_by_county_and_free_meal_frpm_range
description: Count schools in a given county where the K‑12 free‑meal count exceeds a minimum and the K‑12 FRPM count is below a maximum.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County Name` column in the `frpm` table.

min_free_meal.description: Exclusive lower bound for `Free Meal Count (K-12)`.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools.

name: count_schools_by_county_and_grade_range
description: Count schools located in a specified county whose Low Grade and High Grade match given values.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Amador').

low_grade.description: Value of the `Low Grade` column in the frpm table.

high_grade.description: Value of the `High Grade` column in the frpm table.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools, or null if none.

name: count_schools_by_county_free_meal_and_frpm_range
description: Count schools in a specified county whose K‑12 free‑meal count exceeds a minimum and whose K‑12 FRPM count is below a maximum.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County Name` column in the frpm table.

min_free_meals.description: Exclusive lower bound for `Free Meal Count (K-12)`.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools, or null if none.

name: count_schools_by_county_funding_and_max_test_takers
description: Count schools in a specified county and Charter Funding Type where the number of test takers (satscores.NumTstTakr) is at most a given maximum.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County Name` column in the frpm table.

funding_type.description: Exact value of the `Charter Funding Type` column in the frpm table.

max_test_takers.description: Inclusive upper bound for `NumTstTakr` in the satscores table.

return_description: {count: integer|null} — number of matching schools, or null if none.

name: count_schools_by_county_funding_and_open_year_range
description: Count schools in a given county whose FundingType matches the supplied value and whose opening year (extracted from OpenDate) falls between start_year and end_year inclusive.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Stanislaus').

funding_type.description: Exact value of the `FundingType` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Directly funded').

start_year.description: Four‑digit start year (inclusive) for the OpenDate filter.

end_year.description: Four‑digit end year (inclusive) for the OpenDate filter.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools (0 if none).

name: count_schools_by_funding_county_and_test_takers_below
description: Count schools in a specified county that have the given Charter Funding Type and whose number of SAT test takers is less than a provided maximum.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County Name` column in the frpm table (e.g., 'Fresno').

charter_funding_type.description: Exact value of the `Charter Funding Type` column in the frpm table (e.g., 'Directly funded').

max_test_takers.description: Upper exclusive bound for `NumTstTakr` in the satscores table.

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools (0 if none).

name: count_schools_by_math_score_and_charter_funding
description: Count distinct schools whose average SAT Math score exceeds a given threshold and whose Charter Funding Type matches the specified value.

charter_funding_type.description: Exact value of the `Charter Funding Type` column in the frpm table, e.g., 'Directly funded'.

return_description: {count: integer} – number of matching schools (0 if none).

name: count_schools_by_math_score_and_virtual
description: Count distinct schools whose average SAT Math score is greater than a given threshold and whose Virtual flag matches the specified value.

virtual_flag.description: Value of the `Virtual` column; 'F' denotes exclusively virtual as defined in the dataset.

return_description: {count: integer} – the number of matching schools (0 if none).

name: count_schools_by_soc_county_and_statuses
description: Count schools with a given School Ownership Code (SOC), located in a specified county, whose StatusType matches either of two provided values.

soc_code.description: School Ownership Code (SOC) to filter schools, e.g., 69 for District Community Day Schools.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Alpine').

return_description: {school_count: integer|null} – number of matching schools.

name: count_schools_by_virtual_and_math_score
description: Count distinct schools that have the specified virtual status and an average Math SAT score greater than a given threshold.

virtual_status.description: Value of the `Virtual` column in the schools table; 'F' denotes exclusively virtual.

math_score_threshold.description: Minimum average Math SAT score (exclusive, i.e., > this value).

return_description: {count: integer} — number of matching schools (0 if none).

name: extract_school_rows
description: Extract the list of school rows from the dict returned by the previous tool.
return_description: {rows: list of [school, doc] tuples}

name: get_active_district_with_highest_reading_sat_score
description: District name of the active school that has the highest average SAT Reading score.
return_description: {district: string|null} – the district name, or null if no matching school.

name: get_address_of_school_with_lowest_excellence_rate
description: Returns the complete address (Street, City, State, Zip) of the school that has the lowest excellence rate (NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr) in the California schools dataset.
return_description: {"address": {"street": str, "city": str, "state": str, "zip": str}} – address of the lowest‑excellence‑rate school, or null fields if no data.

name: get_admin_email_and_school_of_top_sat_ge1500
description: Administrator email (AdmEmail1) and school name of the school with the highest NumGE1500.
return_description: {rows: list of [admin_email, school_name] rows}

name: get_admin_email_of_charter_school_with_fewest_k12_enrollment
description: Administrator email (AdmEmail1) of the charter school (Charter School (Y/N)=1) that has the fewest K‑12 students (minimum `Enrollment (K-12)`). Returns null if no charter schools exist.
return_description: {admin_email: string|null} – the email address or null.

name: get_admin_emails_by_location_and_year
description: Administrator email addresses (AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2) of schools that match the given county, city, DOC code, SOC code, and whose OpenDate year falls between start_year and end_year (inclusive). Returns a list of [email1, email2] rows.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `City` column in the schools table.

doc.description: DOC code identifying the school district (e.g., 54 for Unified Schools).

soc.description: School Ownership Code (SOC) identifying school type (e.g., 62 for Intermediate/Middle Schools).

start_year.description: Four‑digit start year for OpenDate filter (e.g., "2009").

end_year.description: Four‑digit end year for OpenDate filter (e.g., "2010").

return_description: {admin_emails: list of [email1, email2] rows}

name: get_administrators_by_charter_number
description: Return first‑name, last‑name, school name, and city for all administrators of a chartered school identified by its CharterNum.

charter_number.description: Charter school number as stored in the `CharterNum` column (e.g., '00D2').

return_description: List of rows matching the gold SQL result, each row is [first_name, last_name, school, city].

name: get_average_test_takers_by_county_and_open_year
description: Average number of SAT test takers (NumTstTakr) for schools in a specified county that opened in a given year.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Fresno').

open_year.description: Four‑digit year (e.g., 1980) extracted from the `OpenDate` column.

return_description: {average_test_takers: number|null} – the average NumTstTakr, or null if no rows match.

name: get_average_writing_score_by_admin
description: Returns a list of schools managed by the specified administrator and each school's average SAT writing score.

admin_first_name.description: Exact value of the `AdmFName1` column in the `schools` table.

admin_last_name.description: Exact value of the `AdmLName1` column in the `schools` table.

return_description: {schools: list of [school_name, avg_writing_score] tuples}

name: get_avg_math_and_county_of_school_with_lowest_total_average
description: Returns the average Math SAT score and county of the school whose sum of average Math, Reading, and Writing scores is minimal, formatted as a list of rows.
return_description: {result: list of [avg_math_score, county] rows}

name: get_avg_writing_score_and_city_of_top_ge1500_school
description: Returns the average writing SAT score and the city of the school that has the highest count of test‑takers with total SAT scores ≥ 1500.
return_description: {'result': [[avg_writing_score:int, city:str], ...]}

name: get_cds_of_highest_frpm_count
description: Return the CDSCode of the school with the highest FRPM Count (K-12) in the frpm table.
return_description: {'cds': integer|null} – the CDSCode of the top FRPM school, or null if none.

name: get_cities_of_schools_by_criteria
description: Return the city name(s) of schools that match the specified county, NSLP provision status, lowest grade, highest grade, and school level (EILCode).

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Merced').

provision_status.description: Value of the `NSLP Provision Status` column in the `frpm` table (e.g., 'Lunch Provision 2').

low_grade.description: The lowest grade offered by the school (matches `Low Grade` in `frpm`).

high_grade.description: The highest grade offered by the school (matches `High Grade` in `frpm`).

school_level_code.description: EILCode representing the school level (e.g., 'HS' for high school).

return_description: {cities: list of city strings (empty list if no match)}

name: get_cities_with_lowest_k12_enrollment
description: Cities with the smallest total K‑12 enrollment across all schools.

limit.description: Number of cities to return (e.g., 5 for the top‑5 lowest).

return_description: {cities: list of [city] rows}

name: get_county_with_most_closures_by_soc_and_year_range
description: County that has the highest number of schools closed in a given year range for a specific SOC ownership code.

soc_code.description: Ownership code (SOC) identifying the type of school ownership (e.g., 11 for Youth Authority Facilities).

start_year.description: Four‑digit start year (inclusive) for the ClosedDate filter, e.g., '1980'.

end_year.description: Four‑digit end year (inclusive) for the ClosedDate filter, e.g., '1989'.

return_description: {county: string|null} – the county name with the most closures, or null if none match.

name: get_county_with_most_schools_without_physical_building
description: Among the two specified counties, return the county that has the most schools where `Virtual` = 'F' (does not offer a physical building) and the count of such schools. The output shape matches the gold SQL: a list of rows [[County, count]].

county_a.description: First county name (exact value of the `County` column).

county_b.description: Second county name (exact value of the `County` column).

return_description: List of rows [[County, count]] – exactly the shape of the gold result.

name: get_district_codes_by_city_and_magnet
description: District codes of schools located in a specified city that have the given magnet flag.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `City` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Fresno').

magnet_flag.description: Value of the `Magnet` column: 0 = no magnet program, 1 = magnet program.

return_description: {district_codes: list of integer} – list of matching District Code values (empty if none).

name: get_education_type_of_school_with_highest_average_score
description: Return the EdOpsName (type of education) of the school that achieved the highest average SAT score for a given subject.

subject.description: Subject for which to consider the average SAT score column.

return_description: {education_type: string|null} – the EdOpsName of the top‑scoring school, or null if no rows.

name: get_eligible_free_rate_by_enrollment_rank
description: Returns the eligible free‑meal rate (Free Meal Count (K-12) / Enrollment (K-12)) for schools sorted by descending K‑12 enrollment, skipping a given number of top schools (offset) and returning a specified number of rows (limit).

offset.description: Number of highest‑enrollment schools to skip.

limit.description: How many schools to return after the offset.

return_description: {'rates': list of float|null – the free‑meal rates in order}

name: get_enrollment_5_17_by_edops_city_year_range
description: Return `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` values from frpm for schools matching a given EdOpsCode, city, and academic year range.

edops_code.description: Value of the `EdOpsCode` column in the schools table (e.g., 'SSS' for State Special School).

city.description: Exact city name as stored in the `City` column of the schools table.

start_year.description: First academic year (inclusive) to filter the `Academic Year` column.

end_year.description: Last academic year (inclusive) to filter the `Academic Year` column.

return_description: {enrollments: list of numbers} – enrollment figures for each matching row.

name: get_free_meal_rate_by_admin_name
description: Eligible free‑meal rate (Free Meal Count (Ages 5‑17) / Enrollment (Ages 5‑17)) for the school administered by the specified first and last name.

admin_first_name.description: Exact value of the `AdmFName1` column in the `schools` table.

admin_last_name.description: Exact value of the `AdmLName1` column in the `schools` table.

return_description: {free_rate: number|null} – the free‑meal rate, or null if no matching school.

name: get_frpm_count_ages_5_17_for_highest_reading_sat_school
description: FRPM count (Ages 5-17) for the school that has the highest average SAT Reading score.
return_description: {frpm_count_5_17: number|null} – the FRPM count for ages 5‑17, or null if no matching school.

name: get_frpm_count_by_mailstreet_and_soc_type
description: Return the free or reduced price meal count for ages 5‑17 (`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)`) for the school matching a given mailing street address and SOC type.

mail_street.description: Exact value of the `MailStreet` column in the `schools` table.

soc_type.description: Exact value of the `SOCType` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Youth Authority Facilities').

return_description: {frpm_count: number|null} – the count value or null if no matching school.

name: get_frpm_percent_by_county_and_grade_span
description: List schools in a given county that serve the specified grade span (GSserved) and their Percent (%) Eligible FRPM for ages 5‑17.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Los Angeles').

grade_span.description: Exact value of the `GSserved` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'K-9').

return_description: {results: list of [school_name, percent] rows}

name: get_grade_span_of_school_with_highest_longitude
description: Returns the grade span (GSoffered) of the school that has the highest absolute longitude value.
return_description: {grade_span: string|null} – the grade span offered by the school, or null if no rows.

name: get_high_schools_in_county_with_free_meal_and_type
description: Return rows of high schools in a county with free‑meal count > threshold, matching the gold‑SQL shape.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Monterey').

min_free_meal.description: Exclusive lower bound for `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` in the `frpm` table.

school_type.description: Exact value of the `School Type` column in the `frpm` table (e.g., 'High Schools (Public)').

return_description: List of rows [[School Name, Street, City, State, Zip], ...].

name: get_highest_free_meal_rate_by_sat_excellence
description: Highest eligible free‑meal rate (Free Meal Count Ages 5‑17 / Enrollment Ages 5‑17) among schools with SAT excellence rate > min_excellence_rate.
return_description: {max_free_meal_rate: number|null} — the maximum rate, or null if no school meets the criterion.

name: get_highest_free_meal_ratio_by_county
description: Maximum K‑12 free‑meal ratio (Free Meal Count (K‑12) / Enrollment (K‑12)) among schools in a specified California county.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County Name` column in the `frpm` table (e.g., 'Alameda').

return_description: {ratio: float|null} – the highest ratio, or null if the county has no rows.

name: get_locally_funded_charter_ratio_by_county
description: Percentage ratio of charter schools that are locally funded to charter schools with any other funding type within a given county.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Santa Clara').

return_description: {ratio_percent: number|null} – the computed percentage, or null if no matching schools.

name: get_locally_funded_charter_ratio_percent
description: Compute the percentage ratio of locally funded charter schools to all other charter school funding types within a specified county.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Santa Clara').

return_description: {ratio_percent: number|null} — the percentage (locally funded / non‑locally funded * 100) for charter schools in the county, or null if no matching rows.

name: get_lowest_free_meal_rates_by_school_type
description: Return the lowest N eligible free‑meal rates for students aged 5‑17 in schools of a specified Educational Option Type. The rate is `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`.

school_type.description: Exact value of the `Educational Option Type` column, e.g. 'Continuation School'.

limit.description: Number of lowest rates to return.

return_description: {'rates': [float, ...]} – list of the lowest N ratios (empty if none).

name: get_lowest_low_grade_by_ncesdist_and_edopscode
description: Minimum `Low Grade` among schools whose NCES district ID (NCESDist) and Education Operations Code (EdOpsCode) match the given values.

nces_dist.description: Exact value of the `NCESDist` column in the schools table (e.g., '0613360').

edops_code.description: Exact value of the `EdOpsCode` column in the schools table (e.g., 'SPECON').

return_description: {lowest_low_grade: integer|null} – the smallest Low Grade, or null if no match.

name: get_mailing_street_of_school_with_highest_frpm_k12
description: Unabbreviated mailing street address of the school that has the highest FRPM Count (K‑12) in the dataset.
return_description: {mail_street: string|null} – the street address, or null if no rows.

name: get_math_score_and_county_of_school_with_lowest_total_average_score
description: Returns the average Math SAT score and the county of the school whose combined average scores (Math + Reading + Writing) are the lowest among all schools.
return_description: {result: list of [avg_math_score, county] rows}

name: get_merged_district_ratio_by_county
description: Compute the ratio of the number of merged schools with a specified numerator DOC code to the number with a specified denominator DOC code in a given county.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column (e.g., 'Orange').

numerator_doc.description: DOC code for the numerator district type (Unified School District = 54).

denominator_doc.description: DOC code for the denominator district type (Elementary School District = 52).

status_type.description: Value of the `StatusType` column to filter schools (e.g., 'Merged').

return_description: {'ratio': float|null} – the computed ratio, or null if denominator is zero.

name: get_most_common_grade_span_by_city
description: Most common grade span (GSserved) served by schools in a specified city.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `City` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Adelanto').

return_description: {grade_span: string|null} – the grade span with highest count, or null if none.

name: get_nces_district_ids_by_school_ownership_code
description: Return the NCES district identification numbers (NCESDist) for all schools with a specified School Ownership Code (SOC).

soc_code.description: School Ownership Code for State Special Schools (value 31).

return_description: {nces_district_ids: list of integer} – list of NCESDist values (empty if none).

name: get_open_date_of_school_with_largest_k12_enrollment
description: OpenDate of the first‑through‑twelfth‑grade school that has the largest K‑12 enrollment.
return_description: {open_date: string|null} – the opening date of the school with the largest K‑12 enrollment, or null if none.

name: get_partially_virtual_charter_school_websites_by_county
description: Website URLs of schools that are charter (Charter=1) and partially virtual (Virtual='P') in the specified county.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'San Joaquin').

return_description: {websites: list of string} – list of matching website URLs (empty if none).

name: get_percent_eligible_free_by_admin_first_name
description: Returns a single row [percent, district_code] for the school administered by the given administrator first name.

admin_first_name.description: Exact value of the `AdmFName1` column in the `schools` table.

return_description: List of one row [[percent, district_code]] – matches gold SQL output.

name: get_phone_and_ext_by_zip
description: Return a single row (phone, extension, school) for the school with the given ZIP code.

zip_code.description: Exact ZIP code as stored in the `Zip` column (e.g., '95203-3704').

return_description: {rows: list of [phone, ext, school] tuples}

name: get_phone_numbers_of_charter_schools
description: Phone numbers of schools that are charter schools with a specified Charter Funding Type and opened after a given date.

funding_type.description: Value of the `Charter Funding Type` column in frpm (e.g., 'Directly funded').

return_description: {phones: list of phone strings (may include null).}

name: get_phone_numbers_of_top_schools_by_sat_excellence_rate
description: Phone numbers of the schools with the highest SAT excellence rate (NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr).

limit.description: Number of top schools to return, ordered by excellence rate descending.

return_description: {phones: list of phone strings (may include null)} – the phone numbers of the top‑N schools.

name: get_phone_of_lowest_reading_score_school_in_district
description: Return the telephone number of the school with the lowest average reading score (AvgScrRead) in the specified district, considering only non‑NULL scores.

district_name.description: Exact value of the `District` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Fresno Unified').

return_description: {phone: string|null} – the school's phone number, or null if no matching school exists.

name: get_phone_of_school_with_highest_math_sat_score
description: Return the phone number of the school that has the highest average Math SAT score.
return_description: {phone: string|null} – the phone number, or null if no matching school.

name: get_phone_of_school_with_highest_math_score
description: Phone number of the school that has the highest average SAT Math score.
return_description: {phone: string|null} – the phone number, or null if no matching school.

name: get_phone_of_school_with_highest_sat_ge1500
description: Phone number of the school that has the highest number of SAT test takers with scores over 1500.
return_description: {phone: string|null} – the phone number, or null if no rows.

name: get_sat_test_takers_by_cds
description: Return the number of SAT test takers (NumTstTakr) for a given school identified by its CDSCode.

cds.description: CDSCode identifying a school in the satscores table.

return_description: {'num_test_takers': integer|null} – the NumTstTakr value, or null if the CDSCode is not found.

name: get_sat_test_takers_of_school_with_highest_frpm_k12
description: Number of SAT test takers (NumTstTakr) for the school that has the highest FRPM Count (K‑12) in the dataset.
return_description: {sat_test_takers: integer|null} – the number of SAT test takers for the highest‑FRPM school, or null if not found.

name: get_school_address_by_math_rank
description: Returns the MailStreet (postal street address) and School name of the school that ranks `rank`‑th highest in average Math SAT score.

rank.description: 1‑based rank (1 = highest Math average, 2 = second highest, …).

return_description: {rows: [[string, string]]}

name: get_school_codes_by_min_total_enrollment
description: Return CDSCode identifiers of schools whose total enrollment (K‑12 + Ages 5‑17) exceeds the given threshold.
return_description: {"cds_codes": [...]} list of matching CDSCode strings.

name: get_school_codes_with_total_enrollment_over
description: Return CDS codes of schools where total enrollment (K-12 plus Ages 5-17) is greater than a specified threshold.
return_description: {school_codes: list of string} — list of CDSCode values meeting the criterion.

name: get_school_count_ratio_by_state_and_two_counties
description: Computes the ratio of the number of schools in `county_a` to the number in `county_b` among schools whose mailing address state equals `state`.
return_description: {'ratio': float|null} – the computed ratio, or null if denominator is zero.

name: get_school_percent_frpm_by_county_and_grade_span
description: List schools in a specified county that serve the given grade span, along with the percent of students eligible for FRPM (Ages 5‑17). Percent = FRPM Count (Ages 5‑17) * 100 / Enrollment (Ages 5‑17).

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Los Angeles').

grade_span.description: Exact value of the `GSserved` column indicating the grade span (e.g., 'K-9').

return_description: {schools_percent: list of [school_name, percent] rows}

name: get_school_websites_by_county_and_test_takers
description: Return the website URLs of schools in a specified county whose SAT test taker count falls within a given inclusive range.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Los Angeles').

min_test_takers.description: Inclusive lower bound for `NumTstTakr` in the `satscores` table.

max_test_takers.description: Inclusive upper bound for `NumTstTakr` in the `satscores` table.

return_description: {websites: list of strings} – list of matching school website URLs (empty if none).

name: get_school_websites_by_county_virtual_charter
description: Retrieve the list of website URLs for schools in a specified county that match a given virtual status and charter flag.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table.

virtual_status.description: `Virtual` column value: 'P' = partially virtual, 'F' = not virtual, 'T' = fully virtual.

return_description: {'websites': list of website strings (or empty list if none)}

name: get_school_websites_by_free_meal_range_ages_5_17
description: Website URLs and school names for schools where `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` is between the given inclusive bounds. Excludes rows with NULL website.

min_free_meal.description: Inclusive lower bound for `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)`.

max_free_meal.description: Inclusive upper bound for `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)`.

return_description: {websites: list of [website, school_name] tuples – empty list if no matches.}

name: get_school_with_highest_latitude
description: Return a single row containing the school type, school name, and latitude of the school with the maximum latitude.
return_description: List of one row: [[school_type, school_name, latitude]]

name: get_school_with_highest_test_takers_by_county
description: Name of the school in the specified county that has the highest number of SAT test takers.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `cname` column in the `satscores` table (e.g., 'Contra Costa').

return_description: {school_name: string|null} – the school name with the most test takers, or null if none.

name: get_school_with_lowest_latitude_by_state
description: Find the school in a specified state that has the lowest latitude (southernmost). Returns its city, low grade, and school name.

state.description: Two‑letter state abbreviation, e.g. 'CA' for California.

return_description: {city: str|null, low_grade: str|null, school_name: str|null}

name: get_school_with_lowest_reading_score
description: Returns the mailing street address and school name of the school with the lowest non‑null average reading score (AvgScrRead).
return_description: {result: list of [mailing_street, school] rows}

name: get_school_writing_score_and_phone_by_date_criteria
description: Return each school's name, its average SAT writing score, and phone number for schools opened after a given year OR closed before a given year.
return_description: {rows: list of {school: string, avg_writing_score: number|null, phone: string|null}}

name: get_schools_and_mailing_zip_by_admin
description: List schools and their mailing zip codes for which the primary administrator’s first and last names match the given values.

admin_first_name.description: First name of the primary administrator (column `AdmFName1`).

admin_last_name.description: Last name of the primary administrator (column `AdmLName1`).

return_description: {'schools': [[school, mail_zip], ...]} – empty list if no matches.

name: get_schools_by_free_meal_ratio_and_sat_ge1500
description: List school names whose K‑12 free‑meal eligibility ratio (Free Meal Count (K‑12) / Enrollment (K‑12)) is greater than a given threshold and that have more than a given number of SAT test‑takers scoring ≥1500.

min_free_meal_ratio.description: Exclusive lower bound for the free‑meal ratio (Free Meal Count (K‑12) / Enrollment (K‑12)).

min_sat_ge1500.description: Exclusive lower bound for the count of SAT test‑takers with scores ≥1500 (NumGE1500).

return_description: {school_names: list of string} – matching school names (empty list if none).

name: get_schools_by_free_meal_ratio_and_test_score
description: Return the names of schools whose K‑12 free‑meal eligibility ratio is greater than a given threshold and that have more than a given number of SAT test‑takers scoring ≥1500.

ratio_threshold.description: Exclusive lower bound for free‑meal ratio (Free Meal Count (K‑12) / Enrollment (K‑12)).

min_test_score.description: Exclusive lower bound for NumGE1500 (number of test‑takers with SAT ≥1500).

return_description: {school_names: [str, ...]} – list of matching school names.

name: get_schools_by_sat_takers_and_magnet
description: List school names that have a specified magnet flag and more than a given number of SAT test takers.

min_sat_takers.description: Minimum number of SAT test takers (exclusive).

magnet.description: 1 = magnet school, 0 = not a magnet school.

return_description: {schools: list of school name strings}

name: get_schools_in_district_with_avg_math_above
description: List schools in a specified district whose average SAT Math score is greater than a given threshold, returning each school's name and Charter Funding Type.

district_name.description: Exact district name prefix (e.g., 'Riverside' matches districts starting with 'Riverside').

min_avg_math.description: Exclusive lower bound for the average SAT Math score.

return_description: {rows: list of [school_name, charter_funding_type] tuples}

name: get_schools_with_enrollment_difference_above
description: List schools (name and street) where the K‑12 enrollment minus the Ages 5‑17 enrollment is greater than a specified threshold.

threshold.description: Minimum positive difference (Enrollment K‑12 – Enrollment Ages 5‑17).

return_description: {'schools': [{'school': str, 'street': str}, ...]} – empty list if no matches.

name: get_test_takers_by_mailing_city
description: List of SAT test taker counts (NumTstTakr) for each school whose mailing city address equals the specified city.

city_name.description: Exact value of the `MailCity` column in the `schools` table (e.g., 'Fresno').

return_description: {test_takers: list of integer} – list of NumTstTakr values for matching schools (empty if none).

name: get_top_admin_first_names_with_districts
description: Return the most frequent administrator first names (AdmFName1) from the schools table, limited to a given count, along with each administrator's district.

limit.description: Number of top first‑name values to return (e.g., 2).

return_description: {admin_names: [[first_name, district], ...]} – list of rows for the top N first names.

name: get_top_n_free_meal_rates_by_frpm_and_soc
description: Eligible free‑meal rate (FRPM Count (K‑12) / Enrollment (K‑12)) for the top N schools with the highest FRPM Count (K‑12), filtered by a given ownership code (SOC).

soc_code.description: Ownership code (SOC) to filter schools, e.g., 66.

limit.description: Number of top schools to return (e.g., 5).

return_description: {rates: list of float} – eligible free‑meal rates for the selected schools.

name: get_top_n_phone_numbers_by_sat_excellence_rate
description: Phone numbers of the top N schools ordered by SAT excellence rate (NumGE1500 / NumTstTakr).

limit.description: Number of top schools to return (e.g., 3 for the top‑3).

return_description: {phones: list of phone strings (may include null)} – ordered from highest to lowest excellence rate.

name: get_top_n_schools_by_enrollment_ages_5_17
description: NCES school IDs of the top N schools ordered by descending Enrollment (Ages 5‑17).
return_description: {schools: [string, …]} – list of NCES school IDs in rank order.

name: get_websites_by_county_and_test_takers
description: Retrieve website URLs for schools in a specified county whose SAT test‑taker count is between the given bounds.

county_name.description: Exact value of the `County` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Los Angeles').

min_test_takers.description: Inclusive lower bound for `NumTstTakr` in the satscores table.

max_test_takers.description: Inclusive upper bound for `NumTstTakr` in the satscores table.

return_description: {websites: list of strings} – each string is a school website URL.

name: get_writing_score_ranking
description: List of [CharterNum, AvgScrWrite, rank] for schools with AvgScrWrite > min_writing_score and a non‑null CharterNum, ordered by descending AvgScrWrite.
return_description: List of rows [[charter_number, avg_writing_score, rank], ...]

name: get_zip_codes_of_charter_schools_by_district
description: ZIP codes of charter schools located in a specified district (based on the `District Name` column in the frpm table).

district_name.description: Exact value of the `District Name` column in the frpm table, e.g., 'Fresno County Office of Education'.

return_description: {zip_codes: list of string} – list of ZIP codes (may be empty).

name: list_address_of_school_with_lowest_excellence_rate
description: Returns the address of the school with the lowest excellence rate as a nested list [[Street, City, State, Zip]] to match the gold‑SQL output format.
return_description: Nested list containing one row: [[Street, City, State, Zip]].

name: list_virtual_schools_top5_by_county_reading
description: Names of exclusively virtual schools that rank in the top 5 within their county by average SAT reading score.
return_description: {school_names: list of string} – the matching school names.

name: question_0_wrapper
description: Execute the gold SQL for question 0 and return its rows.
return_description: dict with key 'rows' holding list of result rows

name: rank_schools_by_writing_score
description: Ranks schools (by Charter number) according to their average Writing SAT score. Only schools with a non‑null Charter number and a Writing score greater than a provided threshold are included. Returns the Charter number, the average Writing score, and the rank (1 = highest score).
return_description: List of objects each with `charter_number` (string), `avg_writing_score` (number), and `writing_score_rank` (integer). Ordered by rank ascending.

name: schools_with_enrollment_difference_above_funding
description: List schools (name and DOC) whose K‑12 enrollment minus Ages 5‑17 enrollment exceeds a threshold, filtered by FundingType, ordered by school name.

funding_type.description: Exact value of the `FundingType` column in the schools table (e.g., 'Locally funded').

threshold.description: Minimum enrollment difference (Enrollment (K-12) − Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) that a school must exceed.

return_description: {schools: list of [school, doc] tuples}
